channel.title: Pool Care reminders
channel.description: What's due for the pool — tasks, seasonal open/close, and test advice.

item.title: Pool: heavy rain 2026-07-04 (2.48 in)
item.description: Notable rainfall can dilute chlorine and stabilizer (CYA) and wash in phosphates. Test the water and rebalance if needed.

item.title: Pool: Add chlorine (½ cup)
item.description: ½ cup granular into a half-full 5-gal bucket of water; mix carefully (don't inhale); pour by the pump return.

item.title: Pool: Test the water (strips)
item.description: Dip a test strip and log the results here.

item.title: Pool: 3 readings need attention (test 2026-06-27)
item.description: Free chlorine (low): Chlorine low. Add your usual ½ cup granular chlorine (in a bucket of water, poured by the pump return). Re-test tomorrow. • pH (high): pH high. Add a measured dose of pH Down per label and re-test. High pH weakens chlorine. • Total alkalinity (high): Alkalinity high. Lower it slowly with muriatic acid and aerate; re-test over a few days.

item.title: Pool: Robot vacuum
item.description: Filter first, then run the robot ~1.5 hrs. Daily when you're filtering daily.

item.title: Pool: Run the pump
item.description: Off-season: ~twice a week, 2–4 hrs. Peak summer: run daily.
